ground_truth.title: How much does house cleaning cost in El Cajon, CA?
ground_truth.main_content: As of December 2025, the average starting cost of house cleaning services in El Cajon, CA is $22.48 per hour. The weekly rate for house cleaning services in El Cajon, CA is $899 for working a 40-hour week. And the monthly cost is approximately $2,922 for 130 hours of work. The cost of hiring house cleaning services in El Cajon, CA is approximately -5% lower than California average starting rate of $23.77 per hour and 7% higher than the national average of $21.06 per hour. In some cases, nearby cities may offer more affordable house cleaning services. You may pay more per hour for house cleaning services near El Cajon, CA and several factors can contribute to driving up the average rates. They include: higher cost of living, increased demand for house cleaning services, a more competitive job market, and specific details surrounding your care needs.
